zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Thornhill於大約1238年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾時，他的父親John de Thornhill59歲，母親Olivia Mare47歲。他於大約1249年與Margaret de Fixby在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1287年在英國英格蘭享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Thornhill于大约1238年出生在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾时，他的父亲John de Thornhill59岁，母亲Olivia Mare47岁。他于大约1249年与Margaret de Fixby在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1287年在英国英格兰享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thornhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Thornhill, for example in Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Dorset, and Wiltshire, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Thornell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’, + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Thornhill was born about 1238, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Thornhill, was 59 and his mother, Olivia Mare, was 47. He married Margaret de Fixby about 1249, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1287, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Thornhill est né environ 1238, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Thornhill, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Olivia Mare, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Fixby environ 1249, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1287, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Thornhill um 1238 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Thornhill 59 und seine Mutter Olivia Mare 47. Er hat um 1249 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Fixby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1287 im Alter von 50 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Thornhill è nato il circa 1238 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Thornhill, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Olivia Mare, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Fixby circa 1249, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1287, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Thornhillが約1238年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父John de Thornhillは59歳，母Olivia Mareは47歳であった。約1249年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルでMargaret de Fixbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1287年にイギリスイギリスで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Thornhill(이)가 대략 1238년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Thornhill(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Olivia Mare(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1249년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에서 Margaret de Fixby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1287년 영국 잉글랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Thornhill nasceu aproximadamente 1238, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Thornhill, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Olivia Mare, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Fixby aproximadamente 1249, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1287, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Thornhill родился около 1238 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Thornhill было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Olivia Mare, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Fixby около 1249 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1287 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Thornhill nació aproximadamente 1238, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Thornhill, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Olivia Mare, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Margaret de Fixby aproximadamente 1249, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1287, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
